title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SFC Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SFC Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
